title: FGet Statement
description: This is used when acquiring the properties or status of a force object.
notes: This is used when acquiring the properties or status of a force object.
examples:
Function test Real myForces(8) FSet FS1.Reset FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1 FSet FM1.CoordinateSystem, FCS0 Do
   FGet FM1.Forces, myForces()
   Print myForces(0), myForces(1), myForces(2)
   Wait 1 Loop
Fend
